_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular profiling of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors associated with neurofibromatosis type 1, based on large-scale real-time RT-PCR.

_contextSnippet: Very low levels of target gene mRNA, that were only detectable but not reliably quantifiable by means of real-time quantitative RT-PCR assays, mainly based on fluorescence SYBR Green methodology (Ct >32), were observed for 50 (10.2%) of the 489 genes
resourceName: SYBR Green PCR Core Reagents kit
details: Detected very low levels of target gene mRNA that were only detectable but not reliably quantifiable (Ct >32) for 50 (10.2%) of the 489 genes tested
